title: Urgent Opening Teacher at IDP Education India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at IDP Education India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IDP Education India International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About IDP Education India International Enterprises:
IDP Education India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India International Enterprises!
